text:

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils/xfburn      Makefile

    sysutils/xfburn/files patch-xfburn-xfburn-data-composition.c 
  Log:

    mtimes on directories.
  - Bump PORTREVISION
  
  PR:             129266
  Submitted by:   "J.R. Oldroyd" <fbsd@opal.com> (maintainer)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
